3222060.name: Magic Mine
3222060.description:
Magic Mine is a mixture of arcade, adventure games and classic quests genres. Your father, an experienced miner, mines magic ore on a remote island, supplying the kingdom with a valuable resource. However, you have not received any news from him for a long time and decide to go on a dangerous journey to find him.

You will have to explore various locations and solve puzzles to move forward in the story. Be very careful and do not miss the clues that can help you! Communicate with the locals of the island and do everything to find your father!
